source_basis: Fixture annotation; citation and abstract-like summary only.
what_i_can_verify: The artifact follows the shared book artifact schema.
what_remains_uncertain: Real annotations require the actual citation record, abstract, excerpt, notes, or full text.
user_verification_needed: Verify source metadata and source access level before treating the annotation as research memory.

tool_use_summary: No source lookup, full text, or bibliography database was checked.
gate_status: Not ready for citation or source-use reliance until real source material replaces fixture content.
human_checkpoints: Human reviewer must verify source access level, metadata, and chapter placement.
process_passport.handoff_notes: Use this fixture only to validate annotated-bibliography structure and handoff limits.

bibliography_annotations.annotation_basis: Citation and abstract-like fixture summary only.
bibliography_annotations.main_argument: The source appears relevant to the fixture topic.
bibliography_annotations.method_evidence: Method not visible in this fixture.
bibliography_annotations.best_use: Background orientation until real source material is reviewed.
bibliography_annotations.limitations: Cannot infer full argument, method, or evidence from fixture content.
